title: Annapurna Bhandar scheme goes live today: How to check if your ₹3,000 payment has been credited
summary: West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari will launch the Annapurna Yojana, providing ₹3,000 monthly to women beneficiaries. The inauguration is set for 12.30 pm, with 100 beneficiaries per locality receiving sanction letters. The scheme replaces the previous Lakshmir Bhandar initiative.

title: When a taxpayer dies, filing ITR remains a legal obligation
summary: Under Indian tax law, a person's obligation to file and pay taxes does not end with death. The responsibility passes to their legal representative or legal heirs, and overlooking it can lead to notices, penalties and delays in settling financial affairs.
